title: The Smile Man
description: (note this will not get updated just a port from curseforge and it will only be in 1.20.1)
body:
The Smile Man can attack you and stalk you only during the night at any giving time and will not waste any time. The custom items he has to offer are Dark Ingot, Dark Stick, The Dark Sword and Dark Emerald. The Smile Man can only spawn in forest,plains and taigas and places like that. 

Camper Tom is a camper who can spawn at his own campsite and is trying to find the dark truth about The Smile Man and uncover his secrets and to find out The Smile Mans name is Victor. The Lost Villager can only spawn in his end house in the end after you beat the ender dragon to go to the end islands. Noah Reed a watchtower guy who runs the watchtower and stays there the whole time and helps Camper Tom.

The Lost One is a guy who only spawns in the nehter and has a boss bar and will try to attack The Smile Man because they both hate each other but they share the same trait on trying to kill The Lost Villager, Camper Tom and Noah Reed and the player of course.

New Mod Logo By: [no1zzz__](https://youtube.com/@no1zzz_15?si=CCpWk-wm5_i7Nu2l)
